title: Danielle Smith believes Alberta UCP policies on trans youth are 'supportive'
notes: Primary SAID source for SD-013. Smith: 'supportive,' 'consulted very broadly' (refused to name who). Expert rebuttal: Travers (SFU) + Brennan (U of T) on puberty blockers and suicide risk. Bottom surgery already 18+ Canada-wide — announcement addressed non-problem.
